extra.reason: Independent repository, policy, layout, CI, PRD authority, validation, and no-port-internals bootstrap acceptance criteria satisfied.
Pinned genes-ts v1.33.0 with immutable commit/tree/package hashes and complete supported upstream/local CI evidence; no compiler change or PR was needed.
Accepted separate SDK authority, immutable public sharing boundaries, one-way dependencies, exact claim vocabulary, and immediate auditable correction policy.

Verified tracked Formatter/Gitleaks/path hooks, public CI equivalents, decoded Beads guard, adversarial canaries, and clean full-history scans before remote creation.
